---
title: "Contact"
---

The best way to reach me is by email.

- **Academic email:** [abdulbaari.bakpa@sciencespo.fr](mailto:abdulbaari.bakpa@sciencespo.fr)
- **Personal email:** [abdulbaaribakpa@gmail.com](mailto:abdulbaaribakpa@gmail.com)
- **LinkedIn:** [abdul-baari-bakpa](https://www.linkedin.com/in/abdul-baari-bakpa/)
- **GitHub:** [abdulbaaribakpa](https://github.com/abdulbaaribakpa)

**Affiliation:** Department of Economics, Sciences Po, Paris.
